profile.summary: Hotel Operations Manager with 10 years of experience in four- and five-star properties. Oversaw a 160-room hotel with a team of 45 and lifted guest-satisfaction scores from 8.2 to 9.1 out of 10 over two years.

experiences.title: Hotel Operations Manager
experiences.description: Operational leadership of a 160-room four-star hotel across front office, housekeeping and F&B.
achievements: Lifted guest-satisfaction scores from 8.2 to 9.1 out of 10 within two years through a service-recovery program.
Increased average occupancy from 74 to 86 percent by reworking the room-revenue and channel strategy.
Led a team of 45 across four departments and reduced staff turnover by 22 percent.

experiences.title: Front Office Manager
experiences.description: Managed front-office operations and the reservations team of an 80-room boutique hotel.
achievements: Managed a front-office team of 12 and improved check-in satisfaction scores from 85 to 94 percent.
Grew direct-booking share from 28 to 41 percent by training the team on upsell and loyalty enrolment.

jobPosting.title: General Manager (Hotel)
jobPosting.fullText: Highland Crown Hotels is a Scottish hospitality group operating 6 properties and employing around 700 people. We are seeking a General Manager for our flagship 200-room city-centre hotel in Glasgow. Responsibilities: full operational and commercial accountability for the property, leadership of a team of around 70 across all departments, ownership of revenue, cost and guest-satisfaction targets, and delivery of the annual business plan. Requirements: several years of senior hotel-operations experience, a strong commercial track record, demonstrable leadership skills, and a guest-first mindset. We offer a competitive salary with performance bonus, private healthcare, and clear group-wide progression. Your point of contact is Mr. Callum Fraser, Operations Director. Please indicate your earliest possible start date and salary expectation.
